title: Watch: JD Vance caught in awkward moment as Qatar PM bypasses him, greets Pak PM instead
content: A recent video from the US-Iran discussions in Switzerland has sparked controversy regarding a perceived diplomatic slight to US Vice President JD Vance. The footage captures Qatar's Prime Minister greeting Pakistan's Prime Minister without acknowledging Vance, igniting conversations online. Despite the video's circulation, none of the governments involved have labeled the exchange as a deliberate snub.

title: Drone scare over Moscow: Four airports shut, nearly 60 UAVs shot down
content: Moscow's airspace faced disruption as air defence systems intercepted 59 drones targeting the capital, leading to a temporary shutdown of all four airports. This incident highlights ongoing cross-border attacks, with Russia having previously struck Ukraine's Odesa region with a ballistic missile, causing casualties and damage to an agricultural facility. The situation underscores the escalating tensions and the persistent threat of aerial assaults.

title: 'Looted Ram Temple like Mahmud Ghazni': Sena (UBT) targets BJP over Ayodhya donation row
content: Shiv Sena (UBT) has fiercely criticized the BJP regarding alleged donation irregularities at the Ayodhya Ram Temple, labeling it a "robbery" and a "complete breakdown of law and order." The party accused the BJP of "looting" the temple, drawing parallels to historical invasions. This attack also targeted Union Home Minister Amit Shah, accusing him of being complicit with "looters" within the BJP.

title: Why Afghanistan captain Shahidi was punished by ICC after the third ODI vs India
content: Afghanistan captain Hashmatullah Shahidi received an official reprimand and a demerit point from the ICC for damaging the pitch during the third ODI against India. Despite this, Shahidi scored a maiden century, but India secured a dominant nine-wicket victory, completing a 3-0 series sweep. Shahidi acknowledged his team's shortcomings against a strong Indian side.

title: 'Ain't getting bit by that, bro': Huge uproar after Los Angeles police kills pet dog
content: Outrage erupted after LAPD released body-camera footage showing officers fatally shooting Jameson, a two-year-old dog, during a disturbance call. Police believed the noise was a woman screaming, but it was a family celebrating the Knicks' NBA championship. The dog, wearing a Knicks jersey, was shot after exiting the apartment. The incident has sparked protests and calls for accountability, with the Mayor ordering a thorough investigation.

title: After 43 yrs, US family sells electrical firm for $1.7bn, makes 540 workers millionaires
content: A small-town US family has sold their Louisiana-based electrical-equipment company Fibrebond to power-management giant Eaton for $1.7 billion—and made sure their 540 full-time workers got a $240 million cut of it. Former CEO Graham Walker wrote a single clause into the deal: 15% of proceeds for the staff, none of whom held any equity. The average bonus works out to around $443,000 per worker.

title: England's misery deepens: ICC deducts 12 WTC points after crushing defeat to NZ
content: The penalty leaves England on 38 points in the WTC table. They remain seventh in the standings, but their points percentage has dropped from 34.72 to 26.38.

title: US A-10 attack aircraft fly over Middle East as forces remain deployed across region
content: Despite a tentative agreement with Iran, the US maintains a robust military presence in the Middle East, with A-10 attack aircraft actively patrolling.  This comes as diplomatic talks continue in Switzerland regarding Iran's nuclear program and the crucial Strait of Hormuz.  Following months of intense military exchanges, including a significant US operation, de-escalation signs are emerging, though readiness remains a priority.

title: Yamal enters Pele-Messi club with maiden WC goal, becomes only 2nd player to ...
content: The 18-year-old forward scored in the 11th minute, sliding in at the far post to convert a low cross.

title: UK telecom giants roll out 'kill switch' to block stolen phones from working: How it works
content: UK mobile giants Virgin Media O2 and VodafoneThree have activated a new 'kill switch' for new phones stolen from their stores, aiming to cripple the black market for stolen devices. This move follows resistance from major manufacturers like Apple and Samsung to a universal anti-theft lock. The technology renders stolen, unsold handsets unusable remotely, a measure previously seen in the Netherlands.

title: Watch: Huge fireball erupts after blast at Qatar gas facility; 54 hurt, 18 missing after explosion
content: A significant explosion and fire at Qatar's Ras Laffan Industrial City, a major LNG hub, has left at least 54 people injured and 18 missing. The incident occurred during the start-up of the Barzan gas supply facility. Authorities are investigating the 'technical accident' and have deployed search teams for the missing. While the blaze is controlled, the impact on the wider complex remains unclear amid regional tensions.

title: Watch: US strike on suspected narco-trafficking vessel kills two in Caribbean, six rescued
content: US forces struck a vessel in the Caribbean on June 21, allegedly linked to terrorist groups involved in drug trafficking. Two suspected narco-terrorists were killed, and six survivors were rescued. This operation, part of a broader US campaign against narco-terrorists, highlights intensified efforts under President Trump to disrupt drug networks and combat illegal drug flow into the United States.

title: Europe’s chip equipment company to US: Don’t blame us for China getting the technology
content: Europe's top chip equipment maker, ASML, has refuted US claims that its advanced EUV machines have reached China. The Dutch firm insists it has never shipped such technology to the country, nor any components specifically designed for them. This statement follows US concerns about China potentially acquiring EUV capabilities despite export restrictions. ASML maintains full compliance with Dutch and European export regulations.

title: Salah sparks history as Egypt seal first-ever World Cup win with 3-1 victory over NZ
content: Egypt achieved a historic first World Cup victory, defeating New Zealand 3-1. Star forward Mohamed Salah scored the crucial go-ahead goal, his 68th international strike, after Mostafa Zico equalized. Trezeguet sealed the win, sending Egypt to the top of Group G. They now face Iran needing a draw to advance, while New Zealand remains winless.

title: 'Restore water supply': CJP founder as protesters spend second night at Jantar Mantar
content: Protesters at Jantar Mantar, led by Cockroach Janta Party founder Abhijeet Dipke, are demanding the restoration of water supply and better facilities amidst their sit-in over the NEET-UG paper leak. Dipke also criticized police for questioning those donating supplies. The group, seeking compensation and the Education Minister's resignation, vows to continue their protest until their demands are met, highlighting widespread public support for the cause.

title: Oil prices today: Crude falls after US-Iran talks in Switzerland conclude; Brent below $80
content: Following the conclusion of the US-Iran discussions in Switzerland, global oil prices have seen a decrease as Iran has successfully secured waivers for its oil exports. This alleviates concerns regarding possible supply disruptions, leading to a drop in Brent crude futures as well as WTI. The anticipation of increased Iranian oil supply and potential easing of US sanctions, despite regional tensions, has contributed to the market's response.

title: 'Useless fellows': Kharge loses cool over DK Shivakumar slogans, warns party workers of action
content: "Will the entire country be affected if you shout here? This is not an individual's programme, it is a party programme. You useless fellows... There is no worship of individuals here, we are here for the party programme which brings all of us together," Kharge said.

title: Mahayuti hails 'Operation Tiger' success as Uddhav Sena MP joins Shiv Sena; 5 more in focus
content: Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Omraje Nimbalkar has officially joined Eknath Shinde's faction, confirming the success of 'Operation Tiger'. Nimbalkar cited the disadvantage of being out of power and recent local poll defeats as reasons for his switch. He also mentioned discussions with Union Home Minister Amit Shah regarding a CBI appeal in his father's murder case, assuring his stance against his uncle, Padamsinh Patil, remains unchanged.

title: T20 WC: How India can still qualify for semis after SA defeat – Explained
content: Marizanne Kapp's unbeaten 81 off 45 balls guided South Africa to a six-wicket win and kept their semifinal hopes alive.

title: Top stocks to buy: Stock recommendations for this week - check list
content: Stock market recommendations: Motilal Oswal Wealth Management Research Desk has picked State Bank of India (SBI), and Bharat Electronics as the top stocks to buy for the week starting June 22, 2026. Target prices and upside targets have been given:

title: China retaliates against US blacklist, targets defence & rare earth firms with export controls
content: China has retaliated against US export controls by imposing its own restrictions on 10 American defense and rare earth companies. Additionally, Beijing has banned government procurement of products from 46 US firms, including major defense contractors like Lockheed Martin and Raytheon. This move escalates economic tensions following the US expansion of its blacklist targeting Chinese military-linked entities, signaling a broader strategic rivalry.

title: Parking rage: Minor kills woman, critically injures husband before 5-year-old son in Delhi
content: A shocking incident of parking rage in Dwarka, Delhi, has led to the death of a 26-year-old woman and critically injured her husband. A juvenile neighbour allegedly stabbed the couple after an argument over a motorcycle parked near his father's food cart. The boy's father was reportedly present and encouraged the attack. The victims' five-year-old son witnessed the brutal violence.

title: Fortnite x Olivia Rodrigo confirmed: Skins, release date, price details & more
content: Pop sensation Olivia Rodrigo is set to make a grand entrance into Fortnite, with her collaboration officially confirmed.  Fans caught a glimpse of her upcoming Icon Series skin, inspired by her latest album, through a social media story.  The highly anticipated cosmetic bundle, featuring an outfit, back bling, and more, is expected to launch with Fortnite Festival Season 15 around July 29, 2026, likely priced around 2,500 V-Bucks.

title: Brazil fan tries Rocky Balboa ‘curse’ to derail Lionel Messi’s World Cup dream
content: A Brazil fan sparked online buzz after placing Lionel Messi's Argentina jersey on Philadelphia's Rocky Balboa statue, a tradition believed by some rival supporters to jinx opponents. The stunt came as Argentina prepares to face Austria after Messi's historic hat trick against Algeria. Meanwhile, Brazil climbed to the top of Group C with a 3-0 win over Haiti and will next face Scotland in the FIFA World Cup.

title: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively’s friendship faces strain ahead of wedding
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained privacy even though they are pretty public about their high profile relationship for the last three years. While both of them have remained publicly distant from Blake Lively, it seems Taylor Swift’s friendship with her had taken a dramatic turn, just a few weeks ago as the pop star now gears up to finally get married.

title: T20 WC: SA script history with stunning chase vs India, surpass Australia’s record
content: Marizanne Kapp's sensational 81 powered South Africa to a record-breaking six-wicket victory over India in the Women's T20 World Cup.  Chasing 159, Kapp's explosive innings, supported by Tazmin Brits' 40, secured the Proteas' highest T20 World Cup chase and kept their semifinal hopes alive.  Kapp also impressed with the ball, taking two crucial wickets.

title: Closed expressway & scattered body parts: How a high-speed BMW b'day outing turned fatal for 2
content: A birthday celebration in Badlapur ended in tragedy as a speeding BMW crashed on the underconstruction Mumbai-Delhi Expressway, killing two young individuals and severely injuring the driver. The car was reportedly travelling at extreme speeds, with a social media post suggesting up to 251kmph. Investigators suspect reckless driving and potential attempts to avoid obstructions led to the devastating accident, leaving the vehicle mangled and parts scattered.

title: Nykaa, Bajaj Finance & more: Top stocks to watch on June 22
content: Top financial analysts are optimistic about the prospects of various Indian firms. Bajaj Finance showcases remarkable resilience against economic challenges with its solid asset quality and positive margin outlook. Varun Beverages plans to diversify its product lineup via a strategic partnership. Nykaa is targeting impressive revenue and EBITDA increases by 2030, tapping into changing consumer behaviors.

title: 'I am done with it': Virat Kohli gives blunt verdict on Test comeback
content: Virat Kohli has firmly ruled out a return to Test cricket, even for commercial reasons, stating he is "done with it." Reflecting on his career, the batting maestro emphasized his unwavering belief in fighting until the very end, citing the 2022 T20 World Cup win against Pakistan as a prime example.

title: 'Not sure people know about it': Sooryavanshi makes cheeky admission - watch
content: Teenager Vaibhav Sooryavanshi silenced doubts with a blazing 29-ball 94 in the Tri-Nation Series final, helping India A beat Sri Lanka A by 66 runs. The 15-year-old set a List A record with an 11-ball fifty and insisted he felt no pressure. “I've played a lot of 50-over cricket. Not sure people know about it,” he quipped after the win.

title: Delhi reels under hot and humid conditions
content: Delhi continues to swelter under intense heat and humidity, with no significant relief expected for the next week. While Sunday's maximum temperature was near normal at 38.9°C, the 'feel-like' temperature soared to 43.4°C. Light rain and thunderstorms are possible Sunday night and Monday, offering a brief respite.  Meanwhile, the city's air quality remains in the moderate category.

title: Serena Williams to compete at Wimbledon in stunning comeback at 44
content: Tennis superstar Serena Williams is set to amaze her audience with a highly anticipated return to singles at Wimbledon after accepting a wild card invitation. This exciting comeback follows her recent involvement in doubles alongside sister Venus. The champion, boasting 23 Grand Slam titles, seeks to reignite her legacy on the iconic grass courts, where she has celebrated victory seven times in singles.

title: No JEE ranks, GATE scores in resumes, IIT students told
content: All IITs Placement Committee has asked students to remove entrance exam credentials like JEE ranks and GATE scores from resumes, following concerns that recruiters may infer general or reserved category of students based on ranks.

title: Virat Kohli grooves to Karan Aujla's 'Winning Speech' at grand Delhi event - video
content: At Yashobhoomi in New Delhi, the crowd erupted as Punjabi music star Karan Aujla performed his hits, including the popular 'Winning Speech'. The event was made even more spectacular by the appearance of cricket legend Virat Kohli, who took the stage to express the meaningful connection he felt with Aujla's song, creating unforgettable memories for the audience. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Kaffir screen shot controversy: DYFI national president Rahim moves police against ‘smear campaign’
content: Several leaders, including then CPI(M) legislator K.K. Lathika, had shared the controversial screenshot on social media during the peak of the high-octane election campaign in Vadakara

title: Centre reappoints Solicitor General Tushar Mehta for three years; five ASGs also get extension
content: Tushar Mehta will continue as the country's second-highest law officer for a fresh three-year term, or until further orders, whichever is earlier.

title: New multi-specialty hospital for Yadgir approved in Karnataka Cabinet meeting
content: Former chief minister Siddaramaiah had announced a multispecialty hospital for Yadgir in the budget, and earmarked ₹100 crore for the purpose

title: Tiruvallur ammonia gas leak: Death toll rises to five at seafood processing unit
content: The police arrested the proprietor of the company and the factory manager, who both have a case pending against them for previous violations of industrial safety norms; Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay set up a three-member committee to probe the incident.

title: Vessel docked at private yard catches fire in Kochi
content: The vessel had been undergoing maintenance and had reportedly carried out a trial run the previous day, heightening anxiety in the neighbourhood over the threat posed by the possible presence of fuel

title: SIR explained: What Telangana voters need to know
content: As Telangana gears up for a door-to-door verification of voters, the Special Intensive Revision has emerged as one of the most closely watched electoral exercises in recent years. While election officials describe it as a routine effort to improve the accuracy of voter lists, political parties and electors have raised questions about implementation and the treatment of anomalies in voter data

title: PM Modi greets Tamil Nadu CM Vijay on birthday
content: “Birthday greetings to the Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu, Thiru C. Joseph Vijay Ji. I pray for his long and healthy life,” Mr. Modi said in a post on ‘X’.

title: Rahul Gandhi’s politics of resistance needs a credible path to power
content: Resistance can mobilise supporters around questions of democratic accountability, but political parties require a compelling alternative narrative and a robust organisation on the ground to convert sentiment into votes

title: Rahul Gandhi arrives in Raipur to take part in Congress training camp
content: 10-day training camp aimed at strengthening the party organisation and enhancing grassroots engagement; participants to undertake field visits, engage in shramdaan, and spend a night in villages

title: Maharashtra CM accuses of MVA of sending AI-generated letter to boycott tea party
content: Mr. Fadnavis said that this letter was drafted on Open AI’s chatbot Chat GPT and mockingly said that he was happy the opposition was using technology

title: Group of Nihangs storm gurdwara in Rudraprayag, hold Sikh devotee hostage on roof
content: A heavy police force was deployed at the site following the standoff that began on Saturday (June 20, 2026) evening and is still on, even though the district administration on Sunday (June 21, 2026) said the situation is fully under control and peaceful

title: NEET re-test held across 97 centres amid tight security
content: Delhi students say cancellation of May 3 test disrupted preparation, describe new exam paper as tougher than the old one; re-test will delay admissions and impact alternative career plans: parent

title: End the free rein of junk food advertising in India
content: Restricting the advertising of ultra-processed food (UPF) products and foods high in fat, sugar and sodium (HFSS) is a public health imperative

title: JD(U) national council unanimously endorses Nitish Kumar as national president, calls Nishant its future
content: Nitish Kumar says the JD(U) has taken a place in the hearts of people by fighting for ‘development with justice’, a commitment that, according to him, has resulted in the party’s primary membership exceeding 10 million

title: Patients face pedestrian, civic challenges around major government hospitals in Bengaluru
content: Encroached footpaths, unsafe crossings, flooding and inadequate patient facilities continue to inconvenience visitors despite improvements in traffic management at some locations.

title: The lack of accountability within the NTA
content: The National Testing Agency (NTA) was created in 2017 as a registered society under the Societies Registration Act, 1860 and not through an Act of Parliament, which means it operates without a codified liability standard toward the candidates it examines

title: Cyber scam hubs across Southeast Asia fuelled by human trafficking: APG report
content: Government says 6,998 Indians have been rescued from cyber scam hubs since 2022—2,533 from Cambodia, 2,297 from Lao PDR, and 2,168 from Myanmar

title: Around 600 tonnes of fish sold at Kasimedu on Sunday
content: Fishermen proudly showed off large-sized grouper fish, also called Kalavaan, and sharks caught in their nets

title: ‘Operation Toofan’: DANSAF, police intensify checks on inter-State trucks along highways
content: Special squads, including plainclothesmen and shadow patrol squads, have been deployed at strategic locations along national and State highways and at border transit points to conduct inspections

title: Preparations in full swing for 12th edition of Malabar River Festival
content: Kayakers from Kerala and other States are training in Iruvanjippuzha and Chalipuzha ahead of the festival; pre-event programmes are under way to encourage wider public participation

title: Political parties condole death in ammonia leak at seafood processing unit in Tiruvallur district
content: They urge the Tamil Nadu government to ensure safety guidelines are strictly followed in industrial units

title: CISF to be deployed at five more prisons in Jammu and Kashmir
content: This includes a new high-security prison in Kathua, four district jails; CISF implements tech upgrades at Central jails, including AI-enabled CCTV systems and advanced video analytics for real-time monitoring

title: Engineer’s body recovered from Varthur STP; search continues for another missing worker
content: Varthur Police have registered a FIR against the private firm contracted for maintenance, based on a complaint from BWSSB

title: Gunfire at Congress MLA’s office shows law and order collapse in Haryana, says Hooda
content: Not a single gang was active during the Congress government’s tenure, because the administration’s policy was clear: either give up crime or leave Haryana, says Leader of Opposition Bhupinder Singh Hooda

title: CBSE announces Class 12 re-valuation results
content: “The outcomes are being released in a phased manner, with over 87% of the total applications received being declared today. The outcomes of the remaining applications will be available in phases, and the entire process is expected to be completed soon,” says CBSE

title: Right to vote should be a Fundamental Right: Jairam Ramesh
content: This will ensure safeguards against “voter suppressions” or “arbitrary disqualifications” that Mr. Ramesh alleged took place in different states in astronomical numbers under the SIR process

title: Over 20 lakh medical aspirants appear for NEET-UG 2026 re-exam amidst heightened security
content: The examination is being held from 2.00 p.m. to 5.15 p.m., with the provision of an additional 15 minutes this time

title: Mysuru records over 1.21 lakh trees in citizen-led census
content: A public data portal is being planned to enable residents and others access the tree database, search for trees by ward or species and report concerns relating to tree health. The database will eventually be handed over to the Mysuru City Corporation as a living record of the city’s green infrastructure.

title: VCK urges Vijay to call for all-party meeting on Mekedatu issue
content: This comes after the CPI(M), AIADMK, and the PMK criticised the resolution passed in the Assembly on the grounds that it was not adopted in accordance with the procedure

title: ‘Operation Tiger’ successful, declares Maharashtra Deputy Chief Minister Eknath Shinde
content: “Those who know me, know that we do not leave any operation incomplete,” says Shinde; all six MPs of Shiv Sena UBT are slated to merge with Shiv Sena, say party sources

title: Gehlot questions Shah’s intent in demolition of Muslim religious sites along Rajasthan border
content: Former CM alleges demolitions in border areas after Amit Shah’s Bikaner visit; says action ‘aimed at political polarisation’, urges MHA to clarify

title: India seeks to become a manufacturer in the defence sector, says PM Modi
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi says time has come for India to enter the next phase of maritime development, and the government has adopted a new vision for the shipbuilding sector

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Jumps Over 250 Points Amid US-Iran Talks in Switzerland
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Oil prices climb 2% as Trump issues threat amid US-Iran peace talks; Brent at $82 per barrel.

title: Keir Starmer On The Brink With Resignation Plan Expected Imminently
content: Keir Starmer faces calls to step down after Andy Burnham's election victory boosts leadership challenge prospects.

title: Video: Tornado-Like Storm Hits Tamil Nadu, Causes Major Property Damage
content: Videos recorded by local residents and weather enthusiasts near the Thoothukudi airport area showed a towering, whirling column of dust and debris rapidly gaining intensity.

title: First High-Level US-Iran Talks See Key Agreements After Brief Walkout
content: The joint statement said the summit was conducted in a "positive and constructive atmosphere," with encouraging progress made.

title: After Cyberattack, Competitors Tried To Stop Our Comeback: WazirX Founder
content: On the cyberattack that led to WazirX losing assets worth $230 million, Shetty said, "Our competitors tried to ensure that we never make a comeback."

title: M Kharge Warns Of Action After Workers Chant Slogans For DK Shivakumar
content: Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge warns Congress workers after DK Shivakumar chants disrupt party event in Bengaluru.

title: US-Iran War News Live Updates: US-Iran Negotiations End, Technical Talks Will Continue
content: US-Iran Peace Talks Live Updates: JD Vance had on Thursday cancelled his trip to Switzerland amid rising tension in Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah.

title: Pak Minister Threatens War Against India Over Water Security Amid Crisis
content: Pakistan's Defence Minister Khawaja Asif threatens war against India over water security amid internal crisis.

title: Weather Live Updates:  Delhi's Maximum Temperature Settles Slightly Above Seasonal Average
content: Weather Today, Delhi-NCR Rain Alert Live Updates: Delhi's temperature rises above seasonal average with expected thunderstorms.

title: Congress vs Congress: Shashi Tharoor's Kashmir Remark Triggers Party Storm
content: Congress chief spokesperson in J&K, Ravinder Sharma, lashed out at the post, saying Tharoor should have spared time to meet the people of the Kashmir Valley

title: Tushar Mehta Reappointed As Solicitor General For 3 More Years
content: Tushar Mehta has represented the Union of India in several landmark cases involving constitutional interpretation, national security, electoral reforms, citizenship issues, taxation, digital regulation and Centre-State disputes.

title: Pressure Builds On Keir Starmer To Resign As UK Prime Minister
content: Starmer has publicly vowed to stay in office, but pressure is building as more and more Labour Party colleagues conclude that his time is up.

title: India's Naval Self-Reliance Gets Boost As 3 Indigenous Warships Commissioned
content: The commissioning of the platforms not only augments the operational capabilities of the Navy but also reflects India's advancement in achieving defence self-sufficiency.

title: 1 Killed, Several Injured As Bus Overturns On Ahmedabad-Dholera Expressway
content: One passenger was killed and several others injured, some of them seriously, after a private bus overturned on the Ahmedabad-Dholera Expressway in Ahmedabad district on Sunday evening, police said.

title: Tamil Nadu ammonia gas leak updates: Two women killed in gas leak in Tiruvallur seafood factory
content: Tiruvallur District Collector S. Kavitha visited the factory site and met with patients at the hospitals to oversee relief measures.

title: Vijay forms three-member committee to probe ammonia leak at seafood processing unit in Tiruvallur district
content: It will comprise the Director of Industrial Safety and Health, Member-Secretary of the TNPCB, and Additional Director of Public Health. The panel will submit an interim report within 24 hours and a final report in 3 days. Vijay also orders inspection of hazardous industrial units across the State

title: Two dead, over 60 hospitalised after ammonia leak at seafood processing unit in Tiruvallur district
content: CM announces three-member inquiry committee, ₹2 lakh for kin of the dead, both migrants from Odisha; company’s owner, manager arrested; case pending against them for prior industrial safety violations

title: MVA boycotts CM’s tea party ahead of Maharashtra Assembly’s monsoon session
content: The MVA criticises the government for not providing satisfactory answers on many issues, including drought, farmers’ issues; rise in atrocities against women, and drug trafficking; and deteriorating law and order in the State

title: Selvaperunthagai urges Kharge to relieve him as TNCC president
content: A close confidant of the TNCC president says the swift cutting of ties with the DMK, a long-term ally and a committed anti-BJP force, for the Tamilaga Vettri Kazhaga has left him disillusioned

title: From Shillong to seas: Armed forces celebrate International Day of Yoga across India
content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh led the celebrations in Shillong, accompanied by Air Chief Marshal A.P. Singh and other air warriors; Army Chief General Upendra Dwivedi fronted the celebrations with troops in Tezpur; naval platforms and Indian Coast Guard’s ships at sea and at harbour also took part in the celebrations

title: Diplomatic community joins Yoga Day celebrations
content: This year marked the 12th International Day of Yoga with the theme ‘Yoga for Healthy Ageing’, which emphasised the importance of yoga for all ages

title: U.P. Muslim MPs urge government to refrain from targeted action on heritage structures
content: The MPs say it gave external adversaries unnecessary opportunities to speak about India’s internal matters, and cite Pakistan President’s comment on a Varanasi mosque

title: Tamil Nadu: 2 dead, 62 ill after ammonia leak at firm; NDRF says no spread to residential areas
content: at least two people were killed and 62 others fell ill after an ammonia leak . the death toll is expected to go up as several of those in hospital are on ventilators . leak occurred at a seafood export firm in Kannigaipair .

title: 30% of pedestrian deaths are on national highways: Govt report
content: nearly 30% of more than 1.8 lakh pedestrian fatalities were reported on national highways . 50 million-plus cities had nearly 12-13% of all such deaths during the period . the remaining deaths were reported from urban roads which are not part of the 50 million cities . on average over 30,500 pedestrians were killed annually between 2019 and 2024 .

title: Over 20 lakh students breathe a sigh of relief after smooth NEET-UG retest
content: Manash Pratim Gohain is a seasoned journalist with over two decades at The Times of India, where he has built a rich body of work spanning education policy, politics, and governance. Renowned for his incisive coverage of the National Education Policy (NEP) 2020, accreditation reforms, and skilling initiatives, he has also reported on student politics, urban policy, and social movements. His political reportage—both reflective and news-driven—adds depth to his writing, bridging policy with public impact. Through his 2,500 articles and related outlets, he has emerged as a trusted voice in national discourse, particularly in linking education reform to broader societal change. Read More

title: 'Functional urban settlements': Govt may create new category
content: nearly 84% of india's population resided in urban settlements in 2025, much higher than govt's estimate of 36% . a visit to some villages close to urban areas in Haryana, Uttar Pradesh, Maharashtra, Kerala or Madhya Pradesh will show that these have most ‘urban’ features .

title: Triggered by Telegram curbs, VPN downloads hit 2026 high
content: downloads of the top 100 VPN apps in india reached 919,000 on June 17 . downloads had already climbed to 645,000 on June 16 making June 17 the strongest day for VPN apps since at least 2025 . spikes in downloads often occur when access to websites or apps is disrupted .

title: Don't use '100%' on food labels loosely: CCPA cracks down on misleading F&B claims
content: products contain water, fruit concentrates, preservatives, or only 87% whole wheat flour . can food and beverage companies advertise their products as "100%" natural? can they advertise products as '100% Juice' or "natural Tender Coconut Water"
